sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_pseudo_id)
FROM (
  SELECT user_pseudo_id
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201107`
  WHERE event_name = 'user_engagement'
    AND event_params.key = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND event_params.value.int_value > 0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT user_pseudo_id
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201108`
  WHERE event_name = 'user_engagement'
    AND event_params.key = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND event_params.value.int_value > 0
) AS positive_engagement
WHERE user_pseudo_id NOT IN (
  SELECT user_pseudo_id
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201106`
  WHERE event_name = 'user_engagement'
    AND event_params.key = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND event_params.value.int_value > 0
);

sql:
WITH purchases AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        hitNumber,
        productSKU,
        SUM(productRevenue) AS revenue
    FROM 
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*`
    WHERE 
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM UNNEST(hits) AS hit
            JOIN UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
            WHERE product.v2ProductName = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
        )
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId,
        hitNumber,
        productSKU
),
top_selling_product AS (
    SELECT 
        productSKU,
        SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        purchases
    EXCEPT DISTINCT
    SELECT 
        'youtube_mens_vintage_henley',
        0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        productSKU,
        total_revenue
    FROM 
        purchases
)
SELECT 
    productSKU,
    total_revenue
FROM 
    top_selling_product
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.source,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '201701' AND '201712'
    AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.source, month
),
MaxMinRevenue AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    MAX(total_revenue) AS max_revenue,
    MIN(total_revenue) AS min_revenue
  FROM
    MonthlyRevenue
  GROUP BY
    source
)
SELECT
  mr.source,
  ROUND(mr.max_revenue - mm.min_revenue, 2) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM
  MonthlyRevenue mr
JOIN
  MaxMinRevenue mm ON mr.source = mm.source;

sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_visit_date
    FROM 
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201702*`
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
),
FirstTransaction AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_transaction_date,
        device.deviceCategory AS device_category
    FROM 
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201702*`
    WHERE 
        totals.transactions > 0
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId, device.deviceCategory
)
SELECT 
    fv.fullVisitorId,
    DATE_DIFF(ft.first_transaction_date, fv.first_visit_date, DAY) AS days_elapsed,
    ft.device_category
FROM 
    FirstVisit fv
JOIN 
    FirstTransaction ft ON fv.fullVisitorId = ft.fullVisitorId;

sql:
WITH RevenueByTrafficSource AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.source,
    SUM(SAFE_CAST(hits[OFFSET(0)].item[OFFSET(0)].itemRevenue AS FLOAT64)) AS total_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
    AND hits[OFFSET(0)].item IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.source
),
TopTrafficSource AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    MAX(total_revenue) AS max_daily_revenue
  FROM
    RevenueByTrafficSource
  GROUP BY
    source
)
SELECT
  tts.source,
  tts.max_daily_revenue,
  MAX(rbs.total_revenue) AS max_weekly_revenue,
  MAX(CASE WHEN rbs.date = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH) THEN rbs.total_revenue END) AS max_monthly_revenue
FROM
  TopTrafficSource tts
JOIN
  RevenueByTrafficSource rbs ON tts.source = rbs.source
GROUP BY
  tts.source, tts.max_daily_revenue;

sql:
WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_visitors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions IS NULL AND totals.productRevenue IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_visitors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 THEN totals.pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS total_purchase_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions IS NULL AND totals.productRevenue IS NULL THEN totals.pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS total_non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731'
    AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  month,
  AVG(total_purchase_pageviews / purchase_visitors) AS avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor,
  AVG(total_non_purchase_pageviews / non_purchase_visitors) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM
  monthly_data
GROUP BY
  month;

  AVG(total_non_purchase_pageviews / non_purchase_visitors) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor

GROUP BY

sql:
SELECT 
    p.productSKU,
    SUM(p.productQuantity) AS total_quantity_purchased
FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*`
JOIN 
    UNNEST(hits) AS h
LEFT JOIN 
    UNNEST(h.product) AS p
WHERE 
    p.productCategory = 'Products'
    AND p.v2ProductName NOT LIKE '%YouTube%'
GROUP BY 
    p.productSKU
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_purchased DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH home_page_visits AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(CASE WHEN page.pagePath = '/home' THEN hitNumber END) AS home_hit_number,
    MAX(CASE WHEN page.pagePath LIKE '/home%' THEN hitNumber END) AS last_home_hit_number
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_2017*`,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '01' AND '31'
    AND trafficSource.campaign CONTAINS 'Data Share'
    AND page.pagePath LIKE '/home%'
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
next_pages AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    home_hit_number,
    last_home_hit_number,
    LEAD(page.pagePath) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_path,
    LEAD(hit.time) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_time
  FROM
    home_page_visits,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    hitNumber > last_home_hit_number
)
SELECT
  next_page_path,
  MAX(next_page_time - hit.time) AS max_time_on_home_page
FROM
  next_pages,
  UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
  UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
WHERE
  page.pagePath = '/home'
GROUP BY
  next_page_path
ORDER BY
  max_time_on_home_page DESC
LIMIT 1;

    LEAD(page.pagePath) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_path,
    LEAD(hit.time) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_time
  FROM
    home_page_visits,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    hitNumber > last_home_hit_number
)
SELECT
  next_page_path,
  MAX(next_page_time - hit.time) AS max_time_on_home_page
FROM
  next_pages,
  UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
  UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
WHERE
  page.pagePath = '/home'
GROUP BY
  next_page_path
ORDER BY
  max_time_on_home_page DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    fullVisitorId,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions = 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170731'
    AND pageviews IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    month, fullVisitorId
),
monthly_totals AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    SUM(purchase_pageviews) AS total_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_purchase_visitors,
    SUM(non_purchase_pageviews) AS total_non_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_non_purchase_visitors
  FROM
    monthly_data
  GROUP BY
    month
)
SELECT
  month,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_purchase_pageviews, num_purchase_visitors) AS avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_non_purchase_pageviews, num_non_purchase_visitors) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM
  monthly_totals;

sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_visit_time
    FROM 
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201608*`
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
),
LastEvent AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MAX(CASE WHEN device.isMobile THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS last_mobile_visit_time,
        MIN(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS first_transaction_time
    FROM 
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201608*`
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
    f.fullVisitorId,
    DATEDIFF(
        COALESCE(l.last_mobile_visit_time, l.first_transaction_time), 
        f.first_visit_time
    ) AS max_days_between_first_visit_and_last_event
FROM 
    FirstVisit f
JOIN 
    LastEvent l ON f.fullVisitorId = l.fullVisitorId
WHERE 
    l.last_mobile_visit_time IS NOT NULL OR l.first_transaction_time IS NOT NULL;

FROM

WHERE 
    l.last_mobile_visit_time IS NOT NULL OR l.first_transaction_time IS NOT NULL;
